source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder arrangement contains 0.1 kg R-410a of quality x = 0.2534 at−20\circ\text{C}. Stops are mounted so that V_stop = 3V_1; The system is now heated to the final temperature of 20\circ\text{C}. Find the heat transfer of the process.
